input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.1.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.1.3
            TITLE: synthetic material – prohibited

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.1.3: Synthetic Material – Prohibited
VE.3.1.3 Synthetic Material – Prohibited 
Shirts, socks or other undergarments (not to be confused with flame resistant underwear) 
made from nylon or any other synthetic material which could melt when exposed to high heat 
are prohibited.

final_answer: rule VE.3.1.3: Synthetic Material – Prohibited VE.3.1.3 Synthetic Material – Prohibited Shirts, socks or other undergarments (not to be confused with flame resistant underwear) made from nylon or any other synthetic material which could melt when exposed to high heat are prohibited.
